mnist.mlp - trains multi layer perceptron on MNIST
mnist.cnn - trains CNN on MNIST 
mnist.CI - applies softmax conformal inference 
extract_embeddings - extracts final layer 128-dim embeddings of digits
embedding_ci_centroid - embedding-based ci using centroid distances
visualise_embeddings - 2D visualisations of 128-dim embeddings using UMAP and t-SNE

SOFTMAX BASED CI
- empirical coverage 94.81
- average set size 0.950 
Issue: empty sets from high model confidence. 
Applied RAPS - this has given lots of large prediction sets. 
NEEDS REVISITING

EMBEDDING-BASED CI
Used distance to class centroid nonconformity score
Still lots of empty sets - apparently known issue

Next steps here
- normalise distances
- compare different distance metrics (cosine)
- other nonconformity score methods; nearest neighbour, relative distance scores
- compare three score methods
